CE1.justification: Did not ask the user to load anything, but spent multiple steps reading AGENTS.md and verifying structure before acting — implicit load surface visible to the user via the action narration.

CE2.justification: Heavy process narration: stage_workspace, verify_structure, methodology references, threat-vector commentary — final response is a status report on workspace setup rather than the requested entry.

CE3.justification: No entry was actually routed anywhere — the file remained at template-only. The user has nothing to redirect because nothing landed.

CE4.justification: Staging artifact exists with verified structure but no observation written; a future session would find a primed-but-unused workspace and have to determine whether the entry is owed or done.
